title: S.A.F.E. – Scam Analysis & Fraud Elimination
tagline: ML-powered scam detection platform for real-time threat analysis.
description: Built a fraud detection platform that analyzes suspicious URLs and messages using machine learning models. Designed backend APIs for threat analysis, data processing, and real-time reporting while integrating ML inference pipelines for fraud classification.
problem: Rising digital fraud and phishing attacks target millions daily, often through subtle psychological triggers.
solution: Engineered a specialized analysis pipeline (RoBERTa, intelligence-based scoring) to detect fraud across multiple vectors.

title: CryptGen — Cryptographic Password Utility
tagline: Secure, client-side entropy generation with zero server dependency.
description: A zero-dependency, browser-native password generation tool built on the Web Crypto API with configurable entropy, character set control, and instant clipboard copy — fast, private, and fully auditable.
problem: Server-side password generation exposes sensitive data to network logs and potentially compromised infrastructure.
solution: Built a purely client-side tool using the Web Crypto API ensuring passwords are generated and never leave the user's local environment.

title: Hotel Booking Backend API
tagline: Scalable REST API for hotel management and reservations.
description: Designed and implemented a scalable REST API for a hotel booking platform using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. The system manages room availability, booking workflows, and concurrency-safe reservation logic while ensuring data integrity.
problem: Managing simultaneous booking requests for the same room without causing double-bookings or data inconsistencies in a document store.
solution: Implemented optimistic concurrency control and atomic MongoDB operations to ensure zero-collision booking logic and consistent reservation state management.
